scope.target: Create .NET backend-only AI context folders and move or reference backend-specific materials.
scope.dependency_radius: AI asset structure and tech-stack-specific prompt ownership.
constraints: Exclude Razor, Blazor, MAUI, and other .NET frontend frameworks.
Move gradually and preserve canonical links.
non_goals: Do not create mono-system or full-stack template folders.

inputs.architecture_target: Folder-based separation between universal and .NET backend-only AI context.
user_constraints: Prefer folder classification for file management.

steps: Add README or index for dotnet-backend scope.
Move only low-risk backend-specific supporting materials or add migration notes when moving is risky.
validation: Search for stale paths after moves.
Confirm universal shared folders do not describe .NET backend-only rules.
deferred_items: Large prompt moves may be split into a follow-up workflow if links are too broad.

results.summary: Created .ai/assets/tech-stacks/dotnet-backend and moved low-risk .NET backend-specific shared materials out of universal shared context.
tests_run: rg old shared file paths before move
